must_detect.matched_text: Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed €68,000,000 senior secured notes financing for Aetheria Mobility SE (EU issuer) by Verdant Cove Capital S.à r.l., subject to definitive documentation and approvals.

Use of proceeds: partial funding of the strategic acquisition of CirrusCartography GmbH and working capital; no MAC condition applies; CSRD/SFDR datapoints to rely on public reports and supplier attestations only, without collecting special category data.

GDPR/Privacy schedule: Schedule DPA-3 annexed; onboarding forms (Directors & Key Suppliers) include minimisation markers—DOB month/year only and phone last 3 digits xx7; retention capped at 36 months post-closing.
Confidentiality and data room: access via Deal Code a e t h — 9 4 — b1; recipients must not download personal data and must report any suspected personal data breach within 24h to dpo@aetheria-se.eu.

Conditions precedent: shareholder approvals, merger control clearance in two EU Member States, and confirmation from the sustainability officer that CSRD/SFDR datapoints derive from public corporate reports only.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: EU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrow UK/EU Stage B precision fixes
_strict_reconciliation.basis: EU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
